name: The Wardens
description: The Wardens believe survival depends on discipline, protection, structure, and order. They are expected to be organized, reliable, and strong under pressure.
challenge: Avoid becoming too rigid, controlling, or dependent on rules without understanding the human side of leadership.

name: The Foragers
description: The Foragers believe survival depends on creativity, resourcefulness, speed, and adaptability. They are practical, energetic, and able to solve problems with limited resources.
challenge: Avoid chaos, rushed decisions, or careless execution.
